title: 2 John, Chapter 1
description: Complete text of 2 John chapter 1 from the King James Version (1611).
introduction: Complete text of 2 John chapter 1 from the King James Version (1611).

translation.original_text: <sup>1</sup>ο πρεσβυτερος εκλεκτη κυρια και τοις τεκνοις αυτης ους εγω αγαπω εν αληθεια και ουκ εγω μονος αλλα και παντες οι εγνωκοτες την αληθειαν
translation.text: <sup>1</sup>The elder unto the elect lady and her children, whom I love in the truth; and not I only, but also all they that have known the truth;
